subject: feat(deploy): migrate from GitHub Pages to Vercel
body:
GitHub Pages requires base-path hacks, manual branch config, and a
404.html copy for SPA routing. Vercel handles all of this natively.

- Delete .github/workflows/deploy.yml
- Remove gh-pages dependency and deploy/predeploy npm scripts
- Remove base: '/canva-grid/' from vite.config.js
- Remove /canva-grid/ prefix from all icon hrefs in index.html
- Update PWA manifest id/scope/start_url from /canva-grid/ to /
- Add vercel.json with SPA rewrite rule for client-side routing
- Update README.md, CLAUDE.md, HISTORY.md deployment references
- Add USER_ACTIONS.md entry for connecting repo in Vercel dashboard

Tags: deploy, vercel, pwa, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: vercel-migration
Semver: major
